title: POST-H-015-B — Aggregator read-only de señales operacionales
validation_commands: python -m devpilot_core schema validate --schema-id PostHManifest --instance docs/post_h_015_b_manifest.json --json
capabilities: Required-source blocking for operator dashboard snapshots
Optional runtime evidence represented as unknown/warn
Optional JSON/Markdown runtime report generation under outputs/reports
limitations: implemented-initial; exposes the aggregator module only
Does not expose a public CLI command yet
Does not expose ApplicationService/API routes yet
Does not implement the Web UI dashboard yet
Does not integrate the operator-dashboard-ready quality gate yet
Runtime outputs are generated locally and are not included in clean delivery ZIPs
commands: python -c "from pathlib import Path; from devpilot_core.portfolio import OperatorDashboardAggregator, OperatorDashboardAggregatorOptions; r=OperatorDashboardAggregator(Path('.'), OperatorDashboardAggregatorOptions(write_report=True)).build(); print(r.to_dict())"
pass_criteria: Aggregator builds a schema-compatible snapshot from local sources
Required missing sources block the result
Optional runtime outputs do not create false PASS
No network, external APIs or source mutations are used
block_criteria: Aggregator executes shell commands or uses network
Missing required source is reported as PASS
TCR/docs governance/project state are not synchronized
risks: The dashboard remains non-UI until POST-H-015-D
Public CLI/API exposure remains future scope until POST-H-015-C
Runtime evidence under outputs/reports must be regenerated in each local environment
